body: **Describe the bug** When I click on the "Regarder" button for a series, it does not redirect to the first episode. Instead, it tries to play the content directly as if it were a movie, even though it is a series. **To Reproduce** Steps to reproduce the behavior: 1. Go to the page of a series. 2. Click on the "Regarder" button. 3. Instead of being redirected to the first episode, it attempts to play the series as a movie. **Expected behavior** Clicking "Regarder" on a series should redirect to the first episode, not play content as a movie. **Screenshots** **Desktop (please complete the following information):** - OS: Windows - Browser:Chrome - Version: B1 **Additional context** This issue causes confusion for users trying to watch a series, as it skips proper episode navigation and starts playback incorrectly.
title: [BUG] Clicking "Regarder" on a series does not redirect to first episode
